positive.stdout:

    ~male_player(coco_gauff)).

cnf(u39,axiom,
    female_player(coco_gauff)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~at_rg2022(X0) | male_player(X0) | female_player(X0)).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~lost_to_rafael(coco_gauff)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    at_rg2022(coco_gauff)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~female_player(X0) | lost_to_iga(X0)).

    ~lost_to_iga(X0) | ranked_highly_wta(X0)).

cnf(u41,axiom,
    lost_to_iga(coco_gauff)).

    ~male_player(X0) | lost_to_rafael(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define active_player(X0) := $true
